channel.title: BSHmindYourBusiness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BSHmindYourBusiness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Garmin Cirqa: Everything Known About The Whoop Rival So Far
item.description: It may just be weeks away, and the Garmin Cirqa represents a new style of more lifestyle-friendly wearable for the hardcore fitness brand.

item.title: A Big Update About ‘Running Point’ Season 3 On Netflix
item.description: Will Running Point get a season 3? There's an update on that front from the showrunner, now that season 2 is here.

item.title: NYT Connections Hints Today: Saturday, April 25 Clues And Answers (#1049)
item.description: Looking for today's NYT Connections hints? Some help and the answers for today's game are right here to help keep your streak alive.

item.title: Quordle Hints Today: Saturday, April 25 Clues And Answers
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

item.title: You Can't Paddle Into A 100-Foot Wave. You Can't Incrementally Adopt AI, Either.
item.description: Big wave surfers didn't ride 60-foot waves by paddling harder — they invented tow-in surfing. Enterprise AI adoption requires the same categorical shi...

item.title: Courage vs. excuses
item.description: There are more available excuses now than ever before. In just two letters, “AI” is a simple, brand-new, all-purpose excuse for laying people off, ave...

item.title: Consumers outnumber producers
item.description: New technology often upends the careers of experienced professionals. When the Mac offered typesetting to the masses, typographers were incensed. They...

item.title: The banal djinni
item.description: Technology changes things. Sometimes better, sometimes worse. When a powerful new technology arrives, it offers us wishes. Too often, we waste them, a...

item.title: The right sort of friction
item.description: If we remove impediments that are in the way of where our customers seek to go, they support us. But when we remove the friction that gives people tra...

item.title: Is it sciatica?
item.description: Sometimes, back pain is felt in the thighs or even the ankles. But treating the part that hurts does nothing to address the real problem. Most busines...
